title: sweech doctor: heal stale/missing shared-dir symlinks on existing profiles
description:
When SHAREABLE_DIRS or the share logic in setupSharedDirs evolves (e.g. `commands` and `agents` were added later), existing profiles with `sharedWith: <master>` set in ~/.sweech/config.json are NOT re-synced. The result: `~/.claude-pole/`, `~/.claude-ted/`, `~/.claude-headless/`, `~/.claude-xortron*/`, `~/.claude-heretic/` have NO `commands/` or `agents/` symlinks. When a user launches `claude-pole` and types `/vy-go`, Claude Code reports `Unknown command: /vy-go` because it reads from the empty profile dir.

Fix: add `sweech doctor` (or `sweech repair-symlinks`) that iterates every profile in config.json, checks `sharedWith`, and for each, re-runs the equivalent of `config.setupSharedDirs(commandName, sharedWith, cliType)` — but idempotent (skip if symlink already correct, repair if missing or broken).

In-scope:
- Detect missing symlinks in every shared profile dir.
- Detect dangling symlinks (target deleted).
- Detect symlinks pointing at wrong master (sharedWith changed after profile creation).
- Optionally rebuild from scratch with --force.

Out-of-scope:
- Migrating data from real-file states (already covered by setupSharedDirs).
- Auto-running this on every sweech invocation (separate task: T-077).

context.text: Surfaced in SENTI session 2026-05-17: claude-pole tab couldn't find /vy-go, /vy-product-gaps, /vy-backlog. ~/.claude/commands/ has 206 files (50 vy-); ~/.claude-pole/commands/ does not exist at all. setupSharedDirs in src/config.ts:795 has the right code path — it just never fires for profiles created before `commands` was added to SHAREABLE_DIRS.

Implemented doctor shared symlink repair polish: --fix alias, explicit OK/MISSING/DANGLING/REAL_FILE/WRONG_TARGET labels, E2E tests for missing/dangling/fix flows, and SWEECH_GUIDE recovery docs. Verified npm run build, npm test -- --runInBand, npx tsc --noEmit, SweechBar swift build, and isolated HOME doctor --fix smoke.

acceptanceCriteria: `sweech doctor` lists every profile with sharedWith set and reports MISSING / DANGLING / OK status for each shareable dir + file
Re-running setupSharedDirs is safe (does not destroy real files or data)
Test: create a profile with sharedWith=claude, manually delete ~/.claude-test/commands, run sweech doctor --fix, confirm symlink restored
